seo.title: Next.js Metadata Validator
seo.description: Validate title, description, canonical URL, and social metadata basics before shipping a Next.js page.

content.headline: Check Metadata Quality Before Deploy
content.description: Run a quick metadata sanity check for common SEO and social preview issues in Next.js apps.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Page title
inputs.placeholder: AI invoice OCR for finance teams

inputs.name: description
inputs.label: Meta description
inputs.placeholder: Extract invoice line items with structured output and review workflows.

examples.label: Healthy production metadata

input.title: Invoice OCR for Next.js Apps
input.description: Implement invoice OCR with structured extraction, confidence checks, and human-in-the-loop review in your Next.js workflow.

examples.expected_output: PASS: title length good, description length good, canonical is valid HTTPS URL, og image present.

examples.label: Draft page with issues
examples.expected_output: WARN: title too short, description too short, canonical should be production HTTPS URL, og image missing.

content.how_it_works: The checker evaluates metadata against practical thresholds (title and description length, canonical URL quality, and OG image presence). It returns pass/warn items so teams can fix issues before indexing or social sharing.
